falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong upward trend would contradict the HOLD signal and suggest a reversal from the bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume surges to 3x the 30-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a blowoff top, invalidating the current HOLD and suggesting a reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Central bank announces a rate cut of 50bps or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A major policy shift would create a clear external driver, disproving the UNKNOWN verdict by introducing a falsifiable catalyst.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
